description: Native app surfaces phase A3b: the provisioning (create-and-boot) path. A `device` naming an AVD that doesn't exist, with a `deviceType`, makes Doc Detective create the AVD from the newest installed system image and boot it headless. Gated by `requires.env` on DD_FIXTURE_PROVISION, which only the managed-boot CI job sets (after `doc-detective install android --yes` provisions an image) — so the reuse leg and every other host SKIP. No `osVersion` is pinned here, so creation uses whatever image the job installed.

tests.description: Create and boot the 'dd-provisioned' AVD (headless), open Settings on it, screenshot, and close. The run-end sweep shuts down the emulator Doc Detective booted.
